steps.t: Shades can be found in Audaghaim, east of the Haunted Inn in the Dourstocks. Idhrenfair would like you to glean information from any shade in Audaghai…
The Ranger Idhrenfair awaits you in the Haunted Inn in the Dourstocks, west of Audaghaim. You should return to Idhrenfair and convey the words of the …
